CustomField.description: Final non-overlapping segment list produced by SegmentMerger after all chunks complete. JSON list of {documentType, sourceInstitution, namedParty, startPage, endPage} with full page coverage. Consumed by the documentSplitter LWC to split the source PDF.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed. Final merged segments after all chunks classified. Read by the LWC to split the bundle PDF into typed files.
CustomField.label: Merged Segments JSON
